preferred_name: ambient temperature of a radiation thermometer

preferred_name_ml.en: ambient temperature of a radiation thermometer

definition: temperature measured at a representative point within the local environment, including adjacent heat generating equipment, in which the radiation thermometer will normally operate, be stored or transported

definition_ml.en: temperature measured at a representative point within the local environment, including adjacent heat generating equipment, in which the radiation thermometer will normally operate, be stored or transported
definition_ml.de: Temperatur, gemessen an einem repräsentativen Punkt innerhalb der lokalen Umgebung, einschließlich benachbarter, Wärme erzeugender Geräte, in der das Strahlungsthermometer normalerweise betrieben, gelagert oder transportiert wird
